name: Party Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, onion, milk, egg, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Form the mixture into bite-sized balls.
4. Place the meatballs on a broiler pan and bake for 45 minutes.
5. Mix equal amounts of grape jelly and chili sauce in another bowl.
6. Cook the mixture uncovered at 325 degrees for 30 minutes, stirring often.
7. Transfer the cooked meatballs to the sauce.
8. Serve hot from a chafing dish. These can be made ahead and frozen in the sauce; reheat at 350 degrees until bubbly. Makes 5 dozen.
